svg.title: Complete architecture with grouped tables and pipeline API calls
svg.desc: The live request flows from the Streamlit app through the orchestrator and cache check into the AI agent layer, which pulls data from yfinance and Google News RSS, runs five agents in parallel, and saves a verdict. Postgres holds two table groups: live-answer tables (verdict_cache, predictions) and homepage tables (accuracy, discovery_list, ticker_views). The nightly job writes predictions and accuracy; the daily job reads ticker_views and writes discovery_list; both call the yfinance API. The save-on-miss is event-driven; the two jobs are scheduled by cron.

g.text: Live data: yfinance (prices · fundamentals · ownership) + Google News RSS
